title: MODELINV model.invoke.complete Payload
description: Audit-event payload for a completed model invocation. cycle-102 Sprint 1 (T1.4 + T1.7). Emitted via cycle-098 audit_emit at the end of every cheval invoke() call. primitive_id=MODELINV per SDD section 4.4 (ASSUMPTION-3 RESOLVED Option B). The payload powers vision-019 M1 silent-degradation audit query: any record with operator_visible_warn=false AND len(models_failed)>0 is, by definition, a silent-degradation event.

models_requested.description: Models the call was launched against. Format: provider:model_id (e.g., openai:gpt-5.5-pro). Pattern bounds the surface area of the audit log against accidental inclusion of arbitrary strings.

models_succeeded.description: Subset of models_requested that returned a usable response (after fallback resolution).

models_failed.description: Per-model failure record. Structurally compatible with the model-error.schema.json envelope but inlined here for audit-query ergonomics. The error_class enum is referenced from model-error.schema.json — keep in sync. cycle-104 Sprint 2 (T2.6): added optional 'provider' (per-entry provider) and 'missing_capabilities' (populated when error_class=CAPABILITY_MISS). Records appear in chain-walk order.

provider.description: cycle-104 Sprint 2 (T2.6 / FR-S2.3). Provider key for this entry (e.g. openai, anthropic, google). Optional for backward compat; new emitters MUST populate.

missing_capabilities.description: cycle-104 Sprint 2 (FR-S2.7). Populated when error_class=CAPABILITY_MISS; lists the capabilities the request required that this entry does not declare.

operator_visible_warn.description: True iff a WARN line was surfaced in the operator-visible header (M7 verification). Audit-query for vision-019 M1 silent-degradation count: operator_visible_warn=false AND len(models_failed)>0.

calling_primitive.description: Optional caller-context attribution per SDD section 4.4. Captures which L1-L7 primitive (if any) initiated the call. Null/absent for direct model-invoke CLI or persona-cheval calls.

capability_class.description: If invoked via class-addressing (e.g., top-reasoning); absent for raw model-id calls.

probe_latency_ms.description: Time spent in probe-gate (cycle-102 Sprint 1 T1.4 split per gemini IMP-006). Allows separation of probe-overhead from actual-call latency for M6 verification.

invocation_latency_ms.description: Time spent in the actual provider call (after probe). Excludes probe time. Sum with probe_latency_ms approximates wall-clock.

cost_micro_usd.description: Total cost across all attempts (primary + fallbacks) in micro-USD (1e-6 USD). Used by L2 cost-budget composition per cycle-098 NFR-Cost1.

kill_switch_active.description: True iff LOA_FORCE_LEGACY_MODELS=1 at invocation time (SDD section 11 / gemini IMP-004 HIGH). Audits operator-driven legacy-mode use.

streaming.description: True iff the call used the Sprint 4A streaming transport (cycle-102 AC-4.5e). False if LOA_CHEVAL_DISABLE_STREAMING=1 routed the call through the legacy non-streaming http_post path. Additive field (Sprint 4A) — older audit entries written before this field existed will simply omit it; readers must handle absence as 'unknown' rather than 'false'.

final_model_id.description: cycle-104 Sprint 2 (T2.6 / FR-S2.3). The model that produced the result, in provider:model_id form. May differ from models_requested[0] when within-company chain walked to a fallback entry. Null/absent when models_succeeded is empty (chain exhausted).

transport.description: cycle-104 Sprint 2 (T2.6). Transport of the FINAL successful entry — derived from its adapter_kind. 'http' for streaming/non-streaming HTTP adapters; 'cli' for headless subprocess adapters (claude-headless, codex-headless, gemini-headless). Null/absent when chain exhausted.

config_observed.description: cycle-104 Sprint 2 (T2.6). Audit-the-mode-source per PRD §1.3 axiom 2. Captures the operator-effective headless routing mode AND the precedence layer it came from (env > config > default), so audit consumers can prove which knob produced the chain walk shape.
